title: ZebraCHOP: CRISPR guide-RNA design for zebrafish with Ensembl-aware filtering
description: ZebraCHOP is a zebrafish-focused fork of CHOPCHOP that designs CRISPR gRNAs for any Danio rerio gene, scores them with published efficiency models, maps off-targets with Bowtie, and applies an Ensembl-aware exon filter to bias selection toward early exons. Ships a Python-3 FastAPI web UI and an interactive setup wizard.
